description: RCT of Sulindac for Polyp Prevention in Familial Adenomatous Polyposis
skip_reason: The outcome variables (number3m, number12m) are continuous polyp counts, not binary success/failure. There is no natural binary outcome column — only raw count reductions, which would require an arbitrary threshold to binarize. The dataset is not suitable for Simpson's Paradox cell computation without inventing a binary cutoff.
